name: Z-Wave Proxy
description: The `zwave_proxy` component allows proxying of Z-Wave data frames between a [Z-Wave Modem SoC](https://www.silabs.com/wireless/z-wave/800-series-modem-soc) and [Z-Wave JS](https://zwave-js.github.io/zwave-js/) via ESPHome's [Api](https://esphome.io/components/api/) over the [Wifi](https://esphome.io/components/wifi/) or [Ethernet](https://esphome.io/components/ethernet/). This allows for more flexibility when placing your Z-Wave hardware within your home.

config_entries.label: UART ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [UART Component](https://esphome.io/components/uart) if you want to use multiple UART buses.
